---
sections.nesting:
## Methodology — 2-Wide Length-Based (Canonical, Production-Confirmed)

This item has been confirmed in production at **2-wide nesting** on the 24" Cardinal Red roll. The 2-wide layout is the canonical method for this item's material cost, supplanting the inherited single-nest assumption originally used for sister P/N 1205720.

**Methodology difference from P/N 1205720 (E190 Cardinal Red):**
- **P/N 1186310 (this item):** 2-wide canonical — 2 labels per row, confirmed in production (first PO placed 2026-05-26).
- **P/N 1205720:** Single-nest length-based — 1 label per row, conservative pending E190's first production run.

The two items have dimensionally identical drawings. The methodology divergence is documentation discipline: 1205720 carries the conservative figure ($15.86/label) until E190 production confirms layout; 1186310 carries the production-verified figure ($8.16/label). Once 1205720 has a production run, both will converge to the 2-wide method.

## Roll Specs

| Spec | Value |
|------|-------|
| Roll (canonical for cost) | 3M Controltac 180mC-53 Cardinal Red, 24" × 10yd |
| Roll cost (10yd, canonical) | $162.78 *(price increased from $153.60 on 2026-05-26)* |
| Roll length | 30 ft (10 yd × 3 ft/yd) |
| Cost per linear foot | $162.78 ÷ 30 = $5.426/ft |
| Cost per yard | $16.28/yd |
| Preferred roll (operational) | 24" × 50yd at $775.10 ($15.50/yd) — see 50yd section below |

## Nesting Layout — 2-Wide on 24" Roll

| Dimension | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Label width (across roll) | 11.00" |
| Labels across 24" roll | **2 (2 × 11" = 22", leaves 2" waste strip)** |
| Label pitch (down roll) | 33.5625" + 0.5" bleed = 34.0625" per row |
| Linear ft per row | 34.0625" ÷ 12 = 2.838 ft |
| Labels per row | 2 |
| Linear ft per 20-label run | 10 rows × 2.838 ft = **28.38 lin ft** |
| Positions along 30 ft (10yd) roll | 10 complete rows (30 ÷ 2.838 = 10.57 → 10 complete) |
| **Labels per 10yd roll** | **20 (2 across × 10 rows)** |

## Material Cost per Label — 2-Wide Canonical

**Vinyl (2-wide length-based):**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Linear ft for 20 labels | 28.38 ft |
| Roll length | 30 ft |
| Roll cost (24" × 10yd) | $162.78 |
| Cost for 20-label run | (28.38 / 30) × $162.78 = **$153.99** |
| **Vinyl cost per label** | $153.99 ÷ 20 = **$7.70** |

**Application Tape:**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Label area | 33.5625" × 11.00" / 144 = 2.564 sq ft |
| Tape cost | 2.564 sq ft × $0.18/sq ft = **$0.46** |

**Total Material Cost per Label:**

| Component | Cost |
|-----------|------|
| Vinyl (3M 180mC-53 Cardinal Red, 2-wide) | $7.70 |
| Application tape (TransferRite 582U) | $0.46 |
| **Total material cost per label** | **$8.16** |

## 50yd Roll Improvement (Preferred, Operational)

Cardinal Red is also stocked at 24" × 50yd ($775.10, $15.50/yd) — this is the **preferred roll** for current production volume (E160 + E190 combined). At the preferred roll, vinyl cost per label drops from $7.70 to ~$7.33, total per label ~$7.79 (~4.5% improvement). Per Structure Rules, the canonical `material_cost_per_unit` field uses the conservative 10yd figure ($8.16); the 50yd is documented here as operational reality.

> Material cost updated 2026-05-26 — Cardinal Red 10yd roll price increase $153.60 → $162.78 + nesting method corrected to 2-wide canonical (actual production confirmed via first PO). Previous figure was $7.62 (2-wide at the old $153.60 price). New canonical: $8.16.

---
sections.production:
## Process Steps

1. **File prep** — import 1186310 cut file, verify dimensions, set up tool path. Estimated: 15-20 min (one-time setup).
2. **Cut** — Roland SG3-300 on 24" Cardinal Red stock. 2 labels across, cut in rows.
3. **Weed** — remove excess vinyl around "E160" block letters. 4 large characters, no fine interior detail, open geometry.
4. **Mask** — apply TransferRite 582U transfer tape over weeded characters.
5. **Inspect** — verify cut accuracy, no lifted edges, character legibility.
6. **Package** — flat, masked with transfer tape carrier, ready for hand-application.

## Production Notes

- **Lamination passes:** 0 (cut vinyl, no print)
- **Cut runs:** 1
- **Equipment:** Roland SG3-300 (24" Cardinal Red stock)
- **Weeding complexity:** Low. "E160" is 4 large block characters at generous scale. Direct analog to P/N 1205720 ("E190") — same dimensions, same color, same character count, same letter forms (E, digit, digit, digit).

---
sections.pricing_derivation:
**Methodology:** Direct sq ft parity with P/N 1205720 (cut vinyl baseline, FA Accepted).

**Sq ft comparison:**

| Item | Dimensions | Sq Ft | Price (qty 20) | $/sq ft |
|------|-----------|-------|----------------|---------|
| P/N 1205720 (benchmark) | 33-9/16" × 11" | 2.56 | $35 | $13.67 |
| P/N 3017435 (parity) | 43.91" × 8.38" | 2.56 | $35 | $13.67 |
| P/N 3018378 (parity) | 32.88" × 11.00" | 2.512 | $35 | $13.94 |
| **P/N 1186310 (this item)** | **33-9/16" × 11"** | **2.564** | **$35** | **$13.65** |

Dimensions are identical to P/N 1205720 to the 1/16". Material (3M 180mC-53 Cardinal Red), process (Cut/Weed/Mask), and weeding profile are also identical — only the model number content differs ("E160" vs "E190"). Same tier structure applied.

**Per sq ft at qty 20:** $35 ÷ 2.564 = **$13.65/sq ft**

**Profile Validation:** Within the Cut Vinyl Pricing Profile band ($13.67–$13.93/sq ft at qty 20). The $0.02/sq ft variance from the band's lower bound is a rounding artifact: the band's $13.67/sq ft lower bound was computed from P/N 1205720's 2-decimal sq ft figure (2.56); at 3-decimal precision (2.564, same dimensions), the same $35 price yields $13.65/sq ft. Functionally identical to the cut vinyl baseline. No band adjustment warranted.

**AI Validation:** Not separately run. Per PRICING_VALIDATION.md, multi-round validation is exempt for items dimensionally and materially identical to an already-quoted item — this item is a direct dimensional and material clone of an FA-accepted item. Profile band validation still applies and was performed.

**Override:** None. Engine output.

**Rule 14 deviation acknowledged:** P/N 1205720 is a Relationship Concession. This item prices within the concession-phase band by deliberate strategic choice, not oversight. If/when relationship pricing normalizes, recalibrate against the AI consensus range ($14.84–$16.41/sq ft).

---
sections.margin_analysis:
Margins use the **2-wide canonical material cost** ($8.16), production-confirmed via the first PO on 2026-05-26.

| Qty Tier | Price | Material Cost | Gross Profit | Margin |
|----------|-------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| 1-9 | $45.00 | $8.16 | $36.84 | ~82% |
| 10-19 | $40.00 | $8.16 | $31.84 | ~80% |
| 20-49 | $35.00 | $8.16 | $26.84 | ~77% |
| 50-99 | $30.00 | $8.16 | $21.84 | ~73% |
| 100-199 | $26.00 | $8.16 | $17.84 | ~69% |
| 200+ | $22.00 | $8.16 | $13.84 | ~63% |

**Margin at qty 20: ~77%.** Within the cut vinyl category band.
**Margin floor at 200+: ~63%.** Healthy for a low-complexity cut/weed/mask process.

**First production order:** Qty 20 at $35.00 each = **$700.00**. Gross profit on the run: 20 × $26.84 = **$536.80**.

**Comparison to category:**

| Item | Margin (qty 20) | Material Cost | Methodology |
|------|-----------------|---------------|-------------|
| P/N 1205720 (Cardinal Red, 24" roll, no production yet) | ~55% | $15.86 | Single-nest (conservative) |
| **P/N 1186310 (Cardinal Red, 24" roll, in production)** | **~77%** | **$8.16** | **2-wide (canonical, production-confirmed)** |
| P/N 3018378 (Olympic Blue, 24" roll) | ~78% | $7.88 | 2-wide (length-based) |
| P/N 3017435 (White, 24" roll) | ~76% | $8.46 | 2-wide (length-based) |
| P/N 3017435 (White, 48" roll) | ~81% | $6.74 | 2-wide (length-based) |

The methodology divergence between 1205720 and 1186310 (same drawing dimensions, different material cost) is documentation discipline — 1205720's figure will converge to ~$8.16 once E190 enters production.

---
sections.notes:
- **Direct dimensional and material clone of P/N 1205720.** Same drawing-level dimensions (33-9/16" × 11"), same color (3M 180mC-53 Cardinal Red), same process (Cut/Weed/Mask), same character count (4-character model designation). Only the content differs ("E160" vs "E190"). Sean should recognize this as identical pricing to the FA-accepted E190.
- **Cardinal Red already stocked.** Material was pre-purchased before P/N 1205720's first PO. No new material acquisition needed.
- **No first article offered.** Not requested. Process and tooling are proven from P/N 1205720 — no production risk.
- **Sq ft precision:** This item uses 3-decimal sq ft (2.564), while P/N 1205720 uses 2-decimal sq ft (2.56). The underlying dimensions are identical. The minor $/sq ft difference ($13.65 vs $13.67) is rounding only, not a real pricing variance.
- **Rule 14 status:** Prices within the concession-phase band ($13.67–$13.93/sq ft). When the relationship matures and the band shifts to the AI consensus range ($14.84–$16.41/sq ft), this item and its peers will reprice together.
- **No 48" roll available for Cardinal Red.** Cannot replicate the margin improvement seen on P/N 3017435 (White 48"). Watch for volume patterns — if Cardinal Red orders are frequent across E160 + E190, request 48" roll pricing from 3M supplier.
- **First production order placed 2026-05-26: qty 20 at $35.00 each = $700.00.** Status moved Quoted → In Production same day. Material cost recalculated to canonical 2-wide method ($8.16) using new Cardinal Red roll price ($162.78).
- **Cardinal Red 24" × 50yd now stocked** at $775.10 ($15.50/yd, 4.8% yield improvement vs 10yd roll). Preferred roll for current production volume. Canonical material_cost_per_unit retains the conservative 10yd figure per Structure Rules; 50yd savings documented as operational improvement.

---

sections.nesting:
## Methodology — Single-Nest Length-Based (Conservative)

This item has not yet had a confirmed production run. Material cost is calculated using **single-nest length-based** allocation (1 label per row across the 24" roll), which is the conservative figure pending production confirmation. Sister item P/N 1186310 (dimensionally identical) has been confirmed in production at 2-wide nesting and uses that as its canonical method — when 1205720 enters production and 2-wide is verified for E190, this calculation will be revised to match.

## Roll Specs

| Spec | Value |
|------|-------|
| Roll | 3M Controltac 180mC-53 Cardinal Red, 24" × 10yd |
| Roll cost (10yd, canonical) | $162.78 |
| Roll length | 30 ft (10 yd × 3 ft/yd) |
| Cost per linear foot | $162.78 ÷ 30 = $5.426/ft |
| Cost per yard | $16.28/yd |

## Nesting Layout — Single-Nest

| Dimension | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Label dimensions | 33.5625" × 11" |
| Layout assumption | 1 label per row (conservative; production may confirm 2-wide) |
| Label pitch | 33.5625" + 0.5" bleed = 34.0625" per label |
| Linear ft per label | 34.0625" ÷ 12 = **2.838 ft** |

## Material Cost per Label

**Vinyl (single-nest length-based):**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Linear ft per label | 2.838 ft |
| Roll length | 30 ft |
| Roll cost (24" × 10yd) | $162.78 |
| **Vinyl cost per label** | (2.838 / 30) × $162.78 = **$15.40** |

**Application Tape:**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Label area | 33.5625" × 11.00" / 144 = 2.56 sq ft |
| Tape cost | 2.56 sq ft × $0.18/sq ft = **$0.46** |

**Total Material Cost per Label:**

| Component | Cost |
|-----------|------|
| Vinyl (3M 180mC-53 Cardinal Red, single-nest) | $15.40 |
| Application tape (TransferRite 582U) | $0.46 |
| **Total material cost per label** | **$15.86** |

## 50yd Roll Improvement (Operational)

Cardinal Red is also stocked at 24" × 50yd ($775.10, $15.50/yd) — the preferred roll for current production volume. At the preferred roll, single-nest vinyl cost drops to (2.838 / 12) × $15.50 = $3.667 × $15.50/yd ÷ 3... — recomputed: $15.50/yd ÷ 3 ft/yd = $5.167/ft; 2.838 ft × $5.167/ft = **$14.66** vinyl, $15.12 total per label (~4.7% improvement). Not used as the canonical figure; documented as the operational reality at scale.

> **Material cost updated 2026-05-26 — Cardinal Red 10yd roll price increase $153.60 → $162.78, and nesting method changed from 2-wide to single-nest pending production confirmation.** Previous figure was $7.62 (2-wide @ $153.60). Once 2-wide is confirmed in production for E190, expect ~$8.16 (matching P/N 1186310).

---
sections.production:
1. File prep — import DWG/PDF, set up cut file
2. Cut — Roland SG3-300 on 24" stock
3. Weed — remove excess vinyl around cut characters
4. Mask — apply TransferRite 582U application tape
5. Inspect and package

- **Lamination Passes:** 0
- **Cut Runs:** 1
- **Constraints:** None — simple cut/weed/mask process

---
sections.pricing_derivation:
- **Methodology:** Validated across ~12 AI model responses. Consensus range was $38-42 per label at qty 20.
- **Benchmark Item:** None — this establishes the cut vinyl baseline.
- **Override:** Nick priced at $35, below AI consensus, as a deliberate Relationship Concession on a ~$140K annual account. First item quoted — set the tone for the relationship.
- **Strategic:** $35 was competitive, professional, and signaled that Pro Label is serious about the program. Sean ordered FA next morning without pushback.
- **Profile Validation:** Establishes the Cut Vinyl Pricing Profile at ~$13.67/sq ft (concession-phase). AI consensus would place the band at ~$14.84-$16.41/sq ft. Band expected to shift upward as relationship matures.

---
sections.margin_analysis:
Margins reflect the **single-nest length-based** material cost ($15.86), which is the conservative figure pending E190's first production run. Once 2-wide nesting is confirmed in production (the same method that has been verified on the dimensionally identical P/N 1186310), the effective material cost will drop to ~$8.16 and the margin profile will align with 1186310's table.

## Conservative — Single-Nest @ $15.86 (canonical until production)

| Qty Tier | Price | Material Cost | Gross Profit | Margin |
|----------|-------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| 1-9 | $45.00 | $15.86 | $29.14 | ~65% |
| 10-19 | $40.00 | $15.86 | $24.14 | ~60% |
| 20-49 | $35.00 | $15.86 | $19.14 | ~55% |
| 50-99 | $30.00 | $15.86 | $14.14 | ~47% |
| 100-199 | $26.00 | $15.86 | $10.14 | ~39% |
| 200+ | $22.00 | $15.86 | $6.14 | ~28% |

## Projected — 2-Wide @ $8.16 (post-production-confirmation, mirrors 1186310)

| Qty Tier | Price | Material Cost | Gross Profit | Margin |
|----------|-------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| 1-9 | $45.00 | $8.16 | $36.84 | ~82% |
| 10-19 | $40.00 | $8.16 | $31.84 | ~80% |
| 20-49 | $35.00 | $8.16 | $26.84 | ~77% |
| 50-99 | $30.00 | $8.16 | $21.84 | ~73% |
| 100-199 | $26.00 | $8.16 | $17.84 | ~69% |
| 200+ | $22.00 | $8.16 | $13.84 | ~63% |

**Conservative margin at qty 20: ~55%.** Below the cut vinyl category band (~76–78% at qty 20) and below the 75% target — driven by the single-nest assumption. This is documentation discipline, not a pricing concern: the price was set in the Relationship Concession context and is not being adjusted. Once E190 enters production and confirms 2-wide layout, margin returns to ~77% in line with 1186310.

---
sections.notes:
- **CUT VINYL BASELINE.** First item quoted. Establishes the per-sq-ft rate for the entire cut vinyl category.
- **Relationship Concession.** $35 vs $38-42 consensus. Non-precedent-setting — future cut vinyl items should benchmark against the AI consensus band ($14.84-$16.41/sq ft), not the concession price ($13.67/sq ft). Override Type field flags this.
- **Sean's reaction:** Ordered FA next morning. No pushback. This set the trust level for the entire account.
- **Cardinal Red material:** 24" × 10yd backup roll = $162.78 (price increased from $153.60 on 2026-05-26). 24" × 50yd preferred roll = $775.10 ($15.50/yd, ~4.7% yield improvement). The 50yd is the operational reality for current E190 + E160 combined volume.
- **Material cost corrected from $7.01 (area method) to $7.62 (length-based, 2-wide) on 2026-05-22. Recalculated again on 2026-05-26 to $15.86 (single-nest length-based at new Cardinal Red price). Price unchanged.**
- **Methodology divergence from P/N 1186310 (sister Cardinal Red item):** 1186310 has been confirmed in production at 2-wide nesting and uses $8.16/label as canonical. 1205720 has not had a production run and uses $15.86/label (single-nest, conservative) until production confirms layout. The two items have dimensionally identical drawings — the divergence is documentation discipline, not a real production difference. Expect convergence to $8.16 once E190 enters production.

---

sections.material_spec:

- **Adhesive:** Permanent pressure-sensitive

sections.nesting:
- **Laminator Feed:** 7.88" feeds through 13.5" laminator. Cannot fit all 5 in one pass — **2 lamination passes** (3 in pass 1, 2 in pass 2).
- **Print Layout:** All 5 fit in one print run on Roland SG3-300 (28" max). Three at 7.88" wide, two rotated to 11.13" wide.
- 2 lamination passes required because the Roland SG3-300's 28" print width forces mixed orientation groups. 3 labels print at 7.88" wide, 2 labels rotated to 11.13" wide. Each orientation group requires its own lamination pass.
- **Material Cost Breakdown (per kit):**
  - Vinyl (Orajet 3951): 5 × 0.609 sq ft × $1.21/sq ft = ~$3.68
  - Laminate (1-mil polyester): ~$1.15 (across 2 passes)
  - Ink (eco-solvent): 5 × ~$0.27 = ~$1.35
  - Waste/setup allowance: included
  - **Total material cost per kit: ~$6.03** (per frontmatter canonical value)
  - **Per-label material cost: ~$1.21**

---
sections.production:
1. File prep — import 5 engineering drawing pages, set up print layout
2. Print — 1 run, all 5 labels on Roland SG3-300
3. Laminate — **2 passes** (13.5" max width constraint)
4. Contour cut — **2 runs** (matching the 2 lam groups)
5. Weed, inspect, package as matched set (A through E)

- **Lamination Passes:** 2
- **Cut Runs:** 2
- **Key constraint:** Double lam pass is the sole production inefficiency. Wider laminator collapses to single-pass.

---
sections.notes:
- **Parity boundary is production-based.** Per-label parity applies at ≤2 lam passes, same dimensions, same material. Beyond 2 passes or mixed dimensions → cost-build.
- **Dollar profit per kit is the metric that matters.** $43.97 at qty 20 is excellent despite absorbing the double-pass.
- **Wider laminator upgrade** collapses to single-pass and improves margins without pricing change.
- **50–99 tier: $43 is $43.33 rounded down.** Exact 5/3 parity at this tier would be $43.33.

---
sections.production_debrief: *No production debrief yet. Update after first production run. Capture: actual material usage, time per kit, whether 2-pass lamination worked as planned, actual scrap on double-pass, and critically — does the 2-pass add meaningful time or is it negligible?*

sections.production:
1. File prep — import 3 engineering drawing pages, tile on one layout with registration marks
2. Print — Roland SG3-300, full-color eco-solvent on Orajet 3951. All 3 in one run.
3. Laminate — 1-mil polyester. **ONE pass — all 3 fit.**
4. Contour cut — **ONE run** following registration marks. R.25 corners.
5. Weed — remove excess around all 3 labels
6. Inspect — print quality, lam adhesion, cut accuracy, label-to-label consistency
7. Package — collate A, B, C as matched set

- **Lamination Passes:** 1
- **Cut Runs:** 1
- **Constraints:** None — most efficient kit configuration on current equipment.

sections.pricing_derivation:
- **Methodology:** Full multi-round AI model validation — 25 independent model runs across 6 rounds.
- **Benchmark Item:** P/N 1230820 (root benchmark, single label at $20 qty 20). This kit is 1.5x.
- **Multiplier Logic:** 1.5x consensus from Round 1. Reflects three separately finished labels produced, inspected, and packaged as a controlled matched set.
- **FA Pricing:** Debated $55-$90 across models. Consensus ~$75. Nick set $65 as trust-building move. Override: Relationship Concession on FA only. Production tiers are engine-validated.
- **200+ Tier:** Debated $17 vs $18. Destruction round tipped to $18 — permanent anchor risk + laminate upgrade absorption margin.
- **Profile Validation:** $10.00/label at qty 20 = $16.42/sq ft. Within the Printed + Laminated kit Pricing Profile band.

---
sections.notes:
- **BRIDGE ITEM.** Links root benchmark (1230820) to all future kit pricing. The 1.5x multiplier established here is the basis for 5/3 parity on 1245130.
- **Single-pass efficiency.** Most efficient kit configuration possible on current equipment. Any kit exceeding 13.5" lam capacity in one pass is less efficient.
- **Per-label parity.** $10.00/label at qty 20 matches the 5-label kit. Intentional and documented.
- **Defense:** Frame as process value (matched-set collation, multi-label inspection, controlled packaging), never as multiplier math.
- **Parity boundary:** Per-label parity applies when ≤2 lamination passes, same dimensions, same material. Beyond that, cost-build from scratch.

---
sections.production_debrief: *No production debrief yet. Update after first real production run (not FA). Capture: actual material usage vs estimated, time per kit, whether single-pass nesting worked as planned, scrap rate, whether pricing assumptions held.*

frontmatter.notes: LBL-ELLIOTT 8.38 WHT. 48\" roll dramatically better yield (5 across vs 2). Material cost drops from $8.46 to $6.74 on 48\" stock. FA not requested by buyer for this item.

sections.item_overview:
- **Part Number:** 3017435
- **Description:** LBL-ELLIOTT 8.38 WHT — "ELLIOTT" brand lettering in white vinyl
- **Type:** Vinyl cut lettering (no printing)
- **Content:** Large "ELLIOTT" brand name. Applied to crane body for brand identification. Used across multiple models.
- **Dimensions:** 43.91" W × 8.38" H (~2.56 sq ft)
- **Tolerances:** ±1/16" (assumed account default)
- **DWG Date:** Original — no revision history
- **Status:** Quoted May 2026

---
sections.material_spec:
- **Substrate:** 3M Controltac 180mC-10 White
- **Film Type:** 2-mil calendered vinyl
- **Adhesive:** Controltac repositionable pressure-sensitive
- **Roll Options:**
  - 24" × 10yd = $131.16/roll ($13.116/yard, ~$2.19/sq ft)
  - 48" × 10yd = $257.44/roll ($25.744/yard, ~$2.15/sq ft)
- **Application Tape:** TransferRite Ultra 582U, 30" × 100yd = $135.06 ($0.18/sq ft)
- **Laminate:** N/A

---
sections.nesting:
### On 24" Roll
- 2 labels per row (8.38" + 8.38" = 16.76", fits 24" width)
- Linear footage per row: ~43.91" (~1.22 yards)
- Vinyl cost per label: ~$8.00 (1.22 yards × $13.116/yard ÷ 2)
- Tape: ~$0.46
- **Total: ~$8.46/label**

### On 48" Roll (dramatically better yield)
- 5 labels across (8.38" × 5 = 41.9", fits 48" width)
- Linear footage per row: ~43.91" (~1.22 yards)
- Vinyl cost per label: ~$6.28 (1.22 yards × $25.744/yard ÷ 5)
- Tape: ~$0.46
- **Total: ~$6.74/label**

### Recommendation
48" roll for any order of qty 10+. The per-label savings ($1.72) justify the larger roll purchase. 24" roll for small or one-off orders where stocking 48" isn't warranted.

---
sections.production:
1. File prep — import DWG/PDF, set up cut file
2. Cut — Roland SG3-300 on 24" stock, OR 54" plotter on 48" stock
3. Weed — remove excess vinyl around cut characters
4. Mask — apply TransferRite 582U application tape
5. Inspect and package

- **Lamination Passes:** 0
- **Cut Runs:** 1
- **Note:** 48" stock goes on the 54" plotter, not the Roland.

---
sections.pricing_derivation:
- **Methodology:** Sq ft parity with P/N 1205720. Same ~2.56 sq ft, same cut/weed/mask process, same material family. Identical tier structure.
- **Benchmark Item:** P/N 1205720 (sq ft parity)
- **AI Validation:** Not separately validated — direct parity with an accepted item at the same sq ft. No ambiguity.
- **Override:** None. Engine output matched the parity logic.
- **Profile Validation:** $35 / 2.56 sq ft = $13.67/sq ft at qty 20. Within the Cut Vinyl Pricing Profile band (concession-phase).

Rule 14 deviation acknowledged: P/N 1205720 is a Relationship Concession. This item prices within the concession-phase band by deliberate strategic choice, not oversight. If/when relationship pricing normalizes, recalibrate against the AI consensus range ($14.84–$16.41/sq ft).

- **Brand lettering across multiple models.** This item may have higher volume than model-specific labels since "ELLIOTT" goes on every unit.
- **54" plotter required for 48" stock.** Different equipment than the Roland SG3-300.
- **Quoted same day as 1245130.** Both items in a single email to Sean. No response yet.

sections.item_overview:

- **Description:** Label "D115" Blue — Model Designation

- **Status:** Quoted 2026-05-22

sections.material_spec:

- **Film Type:** 2-mil cast vinyl
- **Adhesive:** Comply repositionable pressure-sensitive
- **Rated Durability:** 10-year (exceeds drawing spec of 5-7 year)
- **Roll Size Available:** 24" × 10yd ($162.78/roll) — price reverified 2026-05-26, unchanged from prior verification (2026-05-22).
- **Application Tape:** TransferRite Ultra 582U — 30" × 100yd ($135.06/roll, $0.18/sq ft)
- **Laminate:** N/A

**PMS Color Note:** Drawing calls for PMS 2386 C ("Primary Blue"). Olympic Blue (3M 180mC-57) is the closest stock color in the 3M 180mC line. This is a visual approximation only — not a certified Pantone match. Quote must disclose this. If Elliott requires an exact PMS 2386 C match, a custom color program or printed vinyl approach is required.

---
sections.nesting:
## Roll Specs

| Spec | Value |
|------|-------|
| Roll | 3M Controltac 180mC-57 Olympic Blue, 24" × 10yd |
| Roll cost | $162.78 |
| Roll sq in | 24" × 360" = 8,640 sq in |
| Cost per sq in | $162.78 ÷ 8,640 = $0.018839/sq in |
| Cost per sq ft | $162.78 ÷ 60 sq ft = $2.713/sq ft |
| Cost per yard | $162.78 ÷ 10 yd = $16.278/yd |

## Nesting Layout on 24" Roll

| Dimension | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Label width (across roll) | 11.00" |
| Labels across 24" roll | 2 (2 × 11" = 22", leaves 2" waste strip) |
| Label length (down roll) | 32.88" = 0.9133 yd |
| Positions along 360" roll | 10 (360 ÷ 32.88 = 10.95 → 10 complete) |
| **Labels per roll** | **20 (2 across × 10 positions)** |
| Unused at roll end | 360" − (10 × 32.88") = 31.2" |
| Roll-end waste | 8.7% of roll length |
| Side waste | 2" strip (9.1% of roll width) |

> **Yield Note:** The session brief indicated "10 labels per roll (2 across × 5 positions)." Verified math: 360" ÷ 32.88" = 10.95 → 10 full positions. Correct yield is **20 labels per roll**. Material cost per label (calculated from $/sq in × allocated area) is unaffected by this discrepancy.

## Material Cost per Label

**Vinyl (length-based, includes blade path allocation):**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Roll width allocated per label | 24" ÷ 2 = 12" (2-across layout) |
| Label length | 32.88" = 0.9133 yd |
| Cost per row of 2 labels | 0.9133 yd × $16.278/yd = $14.864 |
| Vinyl cost per label | $14.864 ÷ 2 = **$7.43** |

**Application Tape:**

| Step | Value |
|------|-------|
| Label area | 32.88" × 11.00" / 144 = 2.512 sq ft |
| Tape cost | 2.512 sq ft × $0.18/sq ft = **$0.45** |

**Total Material Cost per Label: $7.43 + $0.45 = $7.88**

| Component | Cost |
|-----------|------|
| Vinyl (3M 180mC-57 Olympic Blue) | $7.43 |
| Application tape (TransferRite 582U) | $0.45 |
| **Total material cost per label** | **$7.88** |

> **No 48" roll option available for this color.** Olympic Blue is only stocked at 24" × 10yd. If higher volume warrants it, a 48" roll quote from 3M would reduce material cost — document as an operational improvement opportunity, not current pricing basis.

---
sections.production:
## Process Steps

1. **File prep** — import 3018378.dwg, verify dimensions, set up cut file. Estimated: 15-20 min (one-time setup).
2. **Cut** — Roland SG3-300 on 24" Olympic Blue stock. 2 labels across, cut in rows. Estimated: 5-8 min per production run.
3. **Weed** — remove excess vinyl around "D115" block letters. 4 large characters, no fine detail, open geometry. Estimated: 10-15 min per unit at small quantities; 5-8 min/unit at production volume.
4. **Mask** — apply TransferRite 582U transfer tape over weeded characters. Squeegee for adhesion. Estimated: 3-5 min per label.
5. **Inspect** — verify cut accuracy, confirm no lifted edges, check character legibility.
6. **Package** — flat, masked with transfer tape carrier. Label is delivered ready for hand-application on equipment.

## Production Notes

- **Lamination passes:** 0 (cut vinyl, no print)
- **Cut runs:** 1
- **Equipment:** Roland SG3-300 (24" stock)
- **Weeding complexity:** Low. "D115" is 4 large block characters at generous scale. No serifs, no fine interior detail. Similar weeding profile to "E190" (P/N 1205720).
- **Weeding time:** Faster than the 7-character "ELLIOTT" brand lettering (P/N 3017435). Comparable to P/N 1205720.

## Estimated Production Time per Unit

| Step | Time (small qty) | Time (production vol) |
|------|-----------------|----------------------|
| File prep | 20 min (amortized) | — |
| Cut | 8 min | 5 min |
| Weed | 15 min | 8 min |
| Mask (transfer tape) | 5 min | 3 min |
| Inspect + pack | 5 min | 3 min |
| **Per-unit total** | **~45-50 min** | **~20-25 min** |

---
sections.pricing_derivation:
**Methodology:** Direct sq ft parity with P/N 1205720 (cut vinyl baseline, FA Accepted).

**Sq ft comparison:**

| Item | Dimensions | Sq Ft | Price (qty 20) | $/sq ft |
|------|-----------|-------|----------------|---------|
| P/N 1205720 (benchmark) | 33-9/16" × 11" | 2.56 | $35 | $13.67 |
| P/N 3017435 (parity) | 43.91" × 8.38" | 2.56 | $35 | $13.67 |
| **P/N 3018378 (this item)** | **32.88" × 11.00"** | **2.512** | **$35** | **$13.94** |

This item is 2.512 sq ft — 0.048 sq ft less than the 2.56 sq ft benchmark items. Difference is <2%. Process, material family, and complexity are identical. Same tier structure applied.

**Per sq ft at qty 20:** $35 ÷ 2.512 = **$13.94/sq ft**

**Profile Validation:** Within the Cut Vinyl Pricing Profile band (concession-phase band: ~$13.67/sq ft). AI consensus range for this category is $14.84-$16.41/sq ft — this item prices below that range, consistent with the relationship-concession phase pricing established by P/N 1205720.

**AI Validation:** Not separately run. Direct parity with an FA-accepted item at the same sq ft, same process, same material family. Per PRICING_VALIDATION.md, multi-round validation is exempt for items dimensionally and materially identical to an already-quoted item. Profile band validation still applies and was performed.

**Override:** None. Engine output.

Rule 14 deviation acknowledged: P/N 1205720 is a Relationship Concession. This item prices within the concession-phase band by deliberate strategic choice, not oversight. If/when relationship pricing normalizes, recalibrate against the AI consensus range ($14.84–$16.41/sq ft).

**Material cost difference from benchmark:** Olympic Blue ($162.78/roll) vs Cardinal Red ($153.60/roll) results in slightly higher material cost ($7.88 vs $7.01). This reduces margin by ~2 points at qty 20 (78% vs 80%) but does not warrant a price change — the tier structure has been validated by the market at these prices and the margin floor remains acceptable.

---
sections.margin_analysis:
| Qty Tier | Price | Material Cost | Gross Profit | Margin |
|----------|-------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| 1-9 | $45.00 | $7.88 | $37.12 | ~82% |
| 10-19 | $40.00 | $7.88 | $32.12 | ~80% |
| 20-49 | $35.00 | $7.88 | $27.12 | ~78% |
| 50-99 | $30.00 | $7.88 | $22.12 | ~74% |
| 100-199 | $26.00 | $7.88 | $18.12 | ~70% |
| 200+ | $22.00 | $7.88 | $14.12 | ~64% |

**Margin at qty 20: ~78%.** Slightly below the 80% internal target. Acceptable — the 2-point reduction is entirely attributable to Olympic Blue's higher roll cost vs Cardinal Red ($162.78 vs $153.60). Pricing structure is consistent with the accepted market rate.

**Margin floor at 200+: ~64%.** Lower than Cardinal Red (68%) and White/48" (69%). Still profitable. If 200+ orders become frequent, a mild price adjustment on this color's high tier could be considered — but do not adjust proactively.

**Comparison to category:**

| Item | Margin (qty 20) | Material Cost |
|------|-----------------|---------------|
| P/N 1205720 (Cardinal Red, 24" roll) | ~80% | $7.01 |
| P/N 3018378 (Olympic Blue, 24" roll) | ~78% | $7.88 |
| P/N 3017435 (White, 24" roll) | ~76% | $8.46 |
| P/N 3017435 (White, 48" roll) | ~81% | $6.74 |

Olympic Blue sits between Cardinal Red and White (24" roll) — consistent with roll cost ordering.

---
sections.notes:
- **PMS COLOR CAVEAT — must be disclosed in quote.** Drawing specifies PMS 2386 C. Olympic Blue (3M 180mC-57) is a visual approximation, not a certified Pantone match. Language for quote: *"Olympic Blue (3M 180mC-57) is the closest available stock color. This is a visual match, not a certified PMS 2386 C match. If an exact Pantone match is required, a custom color program or alternative approach would be needed — please advise."*
- **New material not previously stocked.** Olympic Blue (3M 180mC-57) has not been used on any prior Elliott item. If FA is ordered, ensure this roll is purchased before committing a ship date.
- **Material cost methodology.** This item uses the length-based vinyl cost calculation (0.9133 yd × $16.278/yd ÷ 2 = $7.43), consistent with P/N 3017435. P/N 1205720 used the label-area method ($6.55 = 2.56 sq ft × $2.56/sq ft), which slightly understated vinyl cost by not accounting for blade path allocation. Future cut vinyl items should use the length-based approach.
- **Labels per roll: 20 (not 10).** Session brief contained a nesting arithmetic error (stated "5 positions" for 10.95 available). Verified: 20 labels per roll (2 across × 10 positions × 32.88" = 328.8" consumed, 31.2" waste at roll end).
- **No 48" roll available for Olympic Blue.** Cannot replicate the margin improvement seen on P/N 3017435 (White). Watch for volume patterns — if orders are frequent, request 48" roll pricing from 3M supplier.
- **Comparison to E190 (P/N 1205720).** Direct analog: same process, same dimensions (within <2% sq ft), same content type (4-character model designation). Sean should recognize this as consistent with existing pricing.
- **Olympic Blue price reverified 2026-05-26 at $162.78/roll — no change from prior verification (2026-05-22).** No material cost update required for this item. (Cardinal Red did change on this date — $153.60 → $162.78 — affecting P/N 1205720 and P/N 1186310 only.)

---
